content.full_text:
August 28, 1978

Mr. James Morton Gass  
California Association of Independent Business, Inc.  
Post Office Box 1304  
Ontario, California 91762

Dear Mr. Gass:

Thank you for your letter of August 19, 1978. In that letter you asked whether the Political Reform Act contained any restrictions which would prevent you, as a registered lobbyist, from being appointed to a board or bureau within the Department of Consumer Affairs.

The Act contains no provisions which would preclude a registered lobbyist from becoming a member of a state board or bureau. However, a lobbyist would remain subject to the prohibitions in Sections 86200 through 86205 of the Act while a member of a state board or bureau.

If I can be of further assistance please contact me.

Sincerely,

J. Richard Eichman  
Compliance Representative

JRE:bw
